# Henry David Thoreau

*1817 – 1862 · American*

American writer and thinker who withdrew for two years to a cabin by Walden Pond to test what a deliberate life demands: voluntary simplicity, civil disobedience in the face of injustice, and distrust of a lectern philosophy cut off from living.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
